title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed code editor now supports local AI models via LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp, enabling developers to run coding assistants on-device without relying solely on cloud APIs. The integration lets users run models like Gemma-4 12B and Qwen locally for code generation, refactoring, and explanations while maintaining privacy.
